fields.Name: QuickBooks - Get Customer
fields.Description: Retrieves a single Customer record from QuickBooks by its external ID

fields.Name: ExternalID
fields.Description: The unique ID of the Customer record to retrieve

fields.Name: Record
fields.Description: The retrieved Customer record with all fields

fields.Name: QuickBooks - Create Customer
fields.Description: Creates a new Customer record in QuickBooks

fields.Name: ExternalID
fields.Description: The external ID of the newly created Customer record
Create not supported by this connector

fields.Name: QuickBooks - Update Customer
fields.Description: Updates an existing Customer record in QuickBooks. Only provided fields are changed.

fields.Name: ExternalID
fields.Description: The external ID of the Customer record to update
Update not supported by this connector

fields.Name: QuickBooks - Delete Customer
fields.Description: Deletes (archives) a Customer record from QuickBooks

fields.Name: ExternalID
fields.Description: The external ID of the Customer record to delete
Delete not supported by this connector

fields.Name: QuickBooks - Search Customer
fields.Description: Searches for Customer records in QuickBooks matching the given field filters

fields.Name: PageSize
fields.Description: Maximum number of records to return (default: 100)

fields.Name: HasMore
fields.Description: Whether more pages of results exist

fields.Name: QuickBooks - List Customer
fields.Description: Lists Customer records from QuickBooks with cursor-based pagination

fields.Name: PageSize
fields.Description: Maximum number of records to return per page (default: 100)

fields.Name: Cursor
fields.Description: Opaque cursor for fetching the next page (from previous ListResult)

fields.Name: Records
fields.Description: Array of Customer records in this page

fields.Name: HasMore
fields.Description: Whether more pages of results exist

fields.Name: NextCursor
fields.Description: Cursor to pass for the next page

fields.Name: TotalCount
fields.Description: Total number of records, if known
